name: Dogo: Dog Training Streak
summary: Dogo confirmed 85K App Store reviews at $9.99/mo with full gamified daily streak. Puppr 55K and Woofz 28K also have streak features. Dog training niche is SOFT_COMPETITION/OCCUPIED at streak level.

summary: AimLab has mobile app with 82K reviews and daily tracking. FPS aim training is SOFT_COMPETITION. However esports analysis habit streak (VOD review daily habit) has zero competitors across all platforms.

summary: Speeko 4.7 28K and Orai 4.7 45K both have daily speaking practice streaks. Public speaking niche is genuinely contested. Morning routine and time blocking have zero streak-first apps.
